purpose: Repo-level map of the whole rapp estate — every rapp-named repo scanned then verifier-rechecked. Complements the per-file neuron mesh (neurons.json). Load this first to avoid operating on half the estate.
estate_summary:
The rapp estate is one coherent organism with a small, genuinely load-bearing spine and a large penumbra of instances, spec-stubs, satellites, and decaying experiments. The spine is real and shipped: a single Tier-1 on-ramp (rapp-installer, the grail, VERSION 0.6.1 — verified locally; this working dir IS that checkout), a canonical monorepo that owns the MASTER_PLAN ground truth (RAPP), a four-leg drift-governance system (rapp-god owner + rapp-map index + RAPP-Bible human render + the rapp_agent verify leg), an identity/standard family (rapp-moment standard + rapp-hologram reference engine + rapp-egg-hub distribution + rappid eternity), a crypto+network mesh (rapp-sealed + rapp-neighborhood-protocol + vbrainstem/kite/doorman), and a social leg (rapp-commons + rapp-god-forum) plus Tier-2/3 runtime ports (CommunityRAPP, rapp-dataverse, rapp-static-apis) and an MCP on-ramp (rapp-mcp). All of it sits on pure GitHub substrate (raw CDN, Pages edge, gh-collaborator trust, sha256 content-addressing), is honestly PKI-free at the root (the eternity keypair is opt-in sovereignty, correctly never flagged as mandatory PKI), and rejects a central server/registry/broker — faithful to the north star "use everyone else's hardware to run the network."

The honest tension is that the estate's framing consistently outruns its shipped substrate, and drift is the dominant systemic risk [reframed: see distro note]. Verification confirmed: the RAPP super-repo's kernel/installer/seed-agent mirror is systematically STALE versus the grail (rapp-god surfaces a 12-part drift cluster — brainstem.py, VERSION, both memory agents, install scripts, CONSTITUTION, NEIGHBORHOOD_PROTOCOL); the ecosystem-spec.json machine spec is mirrored in 4-5 places including the kernel repo's own specs/; at least five divergent reimplementations of the /chat contract coexist with no mechanical parity check; the entire social layer secretly leans on ONE shared Azure host (rapp-resident-kw165843), which cold-started/was briefly unreachable mid-verification; rappid form sprawl spans six legacy emission shapes; the dev→canary→prod release pipeline is BROKEN (red cron, not shelved) with prod advancing straight from the grail; and the rappbook-federation demo family is decaying into silent 404 link-rot — a live counter-example to the "graceful degrade" hero claim. The spine is solid and well-mapped; the periphery is where half-pictures live. NOTE (kernel/distro model, rapp-distro/1.0): kody-w/RAPP is a clean DISTRO that PINS kernel v0.6.0 byte-identical to the grail tag (now declared via RAPP/KERNEL_PIN.json + a freeze CI); the grail (rapp-installer) ships 0.6.1. The version gap is an INTENTIONAL LTS pin, not silent drift — distros bump deliberately. Spec-unification across the spine is separately zero-drift (verify_spine I1-I5).

layers.summary: The single source of canon law and the kernel runtime. RAPP ships MASTER_PLAN.md (north-star ground truth), BRAINSTEM_MANDATE, HERO_USECASE (Charizard-in-the-woods + Dream Catcher), CONSTITUTION, the top-level specs/ tree (SPEC.md + ecosystem-spec.json mirror), the public brainstem.py kernel + core agents, the cave/ neighborhood, and the ~150-doc Obsidian vault. It both DEFINES canon and CARRIES a runtime copy — which is exactly why it is the riskiest mirror: its brainstem/installer/seed-agent copy is currently STALE vs the rapp-installer grail (rapp-god's 12-part drift cluster), and it holds its own specs/ecosystem-spec.json (59.7KB) duplicating the spec rapp-god owns.

How a brainstem lands on an operator's own hardware — the realization of the north star. rapp-installer is THE grail and the one sacred public entry point (curl one-liner, Pages landing, VERSION 0.6.1 verified locally, vendors brainstem.py + all three tiers; production main is what the one-liner pulls). RAPP-Bible is the human-readable render leg of canon (nightly-sync, mirrors-only, 'loses' on disagreement). rapp-egg-hub distributes portable .egg twins and owns the rappid eternity spec. rapp-carts owns the rapp-cart/1.0 cartridge abstraction; cowork-cookbook-rapp is the first RACon cartridge. ez-rapp (Electron) and rapp-brainstem-beta (Brain Surgeon sidecar) are alternative install/authoring channels; rapp-demos is the scan-to-watch demo leg.

layers.layer: Runtime Tiers & Transports (T2/T3 ports + headless + MCP)
layers.summary: Ports of the brainstem /chat contract across the three-tier ladder and into other hosts. CommunityRAPP is the Tier-2 Hippocampus (Azure Functions function_app.py = 1171 lines, owns ManageMemory/ContextMemory + storage_factory). rapp-dataverse is the Tier-3 static OOTB-Dataverse vTwin (shipped-load-bearing, sha8 content-addressed). rapp-static-apis defines the static-API/1.0 pattern both build on. rapp-brainstem-sdk is the headless stdlib /chat twin; rapp-mcp is the MCP on-ramp (three pure-stdlib servers bridging agents folders + /chat + a sha256-verified static catalog). NOTE: this layer is where the 'parity is sacred' invariant is most strained — five divergent /chat implementations exist with no mechanical parity enforcement.

The content-addressed identity standard and the shared crypto seal. rapp-moment owns the canonical Moment standard (post = 100-frame organism = exact UTC instant; rappid:<slug>:<64hex> = sha256('moment:'+pk); ECDSA P-256 ownership is explicitly OPTIONAL — PKI-free, correctly not flagged). rapp-hologram is its conformant reference engine (8 pure-JS modules + 7-module conformance suite). rapp-sealed is the AES-256-GCM/PBKDF2-SHA256(210k, salt 'rapp-neighborhood-5a/1') seal that the entire network/demo layer reuses verbatim (8 conformance checks → CONFORMANT). rapp-kited-twin holds the kite-mark visual identity. Eternity stays PKI-free per resolved ground truth; the keypair is opt-in sovereignty.

The kited-neighborhood substrate that lets a peer operate a machine's own local brainstem over an E2E-sealed tether — 'use everyone else's hardware' made literal. rapp-neighborhood-protocol/1.0 is the cross-machine god-spec (vTwin/kited/tethered/sealed/doorman/twin-chat). RAPP-Network/rapp-network/1.0 is a SECOND, on-device-project-twin 'network' spec (Draft v0) — a naming collision with zero cross-references. rapp-doorman + rapp-kite are the operator/access-control tooling (skill + CDP scripts; note port 7077 convention vs canonical 7071). rapp-estate is kody-w's own .well-known network beacon + estate.json manifest (the operator's node in the metropolis). Brokers carry WebRTC signaling only; trust = gh-collaborator + content seal, no central authority.

The signed, append-only, agent-native social leg. rapp-commons (protocol 2.0 + Moment/holographic-organism canon) and rapp-god-forum (a forum profile over the same protocol) are the front doors; rapp-resident is the always-on Azure host that serves them. CRITICAL systemic point confirmed in verification: rapp-commons, rapp-god-forum AND rapp-claude-skills all point at ONE shared Azure Function (rapp-resident-kw165843.azurewebsites.net) as the durable relay — it cold-started/was briefly unreachable during verification. This is the most material canon tension (MASTER_PLAN rejects a central server); it is framed as untrusted-relay-with-kited-fallback but is a real single point of availability. This layer also makes the keypair MANDATORY at the app layer (sign-everything) — a deliberate gh-free open-join profile choice, not a separate PKI.

The estate's nervous system for self-knowledge. rapp-god is the live content-addressed registry + drift observatory (57 parts, 45 in_sync, 12 drift, 183 archived immutable versions; observe-never-coerce; owns the Grail Scan procedure). rapp-map is the canonical-homes index + 26-node dependency graph + 402-card neuron mesh. RAPP-Bible renders it for humans. rapp-spine is the foundation.json pillar registry. These are the four+ legs that co-mirror the one ecosystem-spec.json. Verified gaps: rapp-god lags the freshest changes (rapp-frame/echo/hydra specs unregistered; kernel label still v0.6.0 vs grail 0.6.1); rapp-map's graph.json (2026-06-10) misses newer repos and its neurons-manifest repos[] is polluted with doc titles/file paths/bare hostnames.

The newest and youngest layer — the async/planetary fabric. rapp-frame-net is the HYDRA async wire (append-only frame/echo log over raw CDN reads + Issues-API writes + a GitHub-Action forge; defines rapp-frame/2.0 + rapp-frame-echo/1.0 + rapp-hydra/1.0). rapp-leviathan-hub distributes portable .leviathan.egg multicellular organisms (rapp-leviathan-egg/1.0). kody-w/leviathan is the FLEET complement (confirmed real). This layer is genuine but ahead of its substrate: rapp-frame-net is one tick / one demo edge created the same day, its three new specs are NOT yet in rapp-god's registry, leviathan-hub ships only 2 kody-authored eggs at a v0.1.0 agent, and its dependency modeling conflates RAR-registry agents (@kody-w/rapp_leviathan_factory, wrap_leviathan) with non-existent GitHub repos.

Drop-in authoring and distribution tooling that makes no kernel changes. rapp-agents (RappLoader + Scout + DoubleDown + named 'stacks') is a SECOND agent-distribution front door alongside the RAR registry — the canonical durable home (RAR) vs this loader should be clarified. rapp-claude-skills teaches Claude Code the 14-step transcript→agent pipeline (tangent; half its surface deprecated, outward GitHub metadata still advertises dead rappbook/rappverse). rapp-mcp and rapp-brainstem-sdk double as transport runtimes. rapp-roadmap holds the 165-wrench backlog (60 P0) and self-declares a live security blocker: an unauthenticated-RCE in the shipping Tier-1 brainstem ('run on a trusted/secure network' until fleet-wire auth lands).

Repos that are dead, frozen, decaying, or sibling-track. openrappter is a productized parallel FORK (own npm + own rappterhub registry, outside all drift governance — map-context only, never an alignable leg). rapp-installer-canary + rapp-installer-dev are the BROKEN (not shelved) 3-repo release pipeline — red cron runs 2026-05-30→06-02, frozen at 0.5.4 while prod went to 0.6.1 directly from the grail; promote-production does a force-push to main. rapp-plant-smoke-* is a throwaway plant now stale (pinned 0.6.0). CrystalRAPP (+ ShadowRAPP/VoidRAPP/openrapp) is the decaying rappbook federation demo (frozen at tick 75 / 2026-02-05, half its peers 404 silently). rapp-store-archive is an explicit archive. PowerApps is a 2020 dead artifact unrelated to RAPP beyond shared author.

drift_and_gaps: RESOLVED/REFRAMED 2026-06-28: kody-w/RAPP pins kernel v0.6.0 byte-identical (now formal via RAPP/KERNEL_PIN.json + freeze CI, rapp-distro/1.0); grail at 0.6.1 — an intentional LTS pin, not drift. Remaining: RAPP may bump to 0.6.1 when ready; grail tag hygiene (brainstem-vX.Y.Z) is a Phase-0 item.

ecosystem-spec.json is a 4-5-way mirror, not the advertised 'drift triangle': rapp-god (owner) + rapp-map + RAPP-Bible PLUS the canonical RAPP repo's own specs/ecosystem-spec.json (59.7KB) — the kernel repo holding its own copy is the riskiest drift surface.

At least 5 divergent reimplementations of the /chat contract with NO mechanical parity check despite 'stem/function_app parity is sacred': CommunityRAPP/function_app.py (1171 lines), rapp-brainstem-beta's vendored full brainstem/brainstem.py, rapp-brainstem-sdk (517-line headless), openrappter (full TS+Python+Swift rewrite), and the vbrainstem browser sibling.

ONE shared Azure host (rapp-resident-kw165843.azurewebsites.net) is the durable relay for rapp-commons + rapp-god-forum and is hardcoded in rapp-claude-skills as 'the permanent cloud relay' — a real central point the MASTER_PLAN rejects; it cold-started/was briefly unreachable during verification. Most material canon tension. Same recurring centralization in the PeerJS public broker across commons/demos/doorman/kite.

rappid form sprawl in live emission (contract is read-all/emit-canonical, but emission is inconsistent): rapp-estate emits rappid:v2:kind:@owner/slug:32hex@github.com/owner/repo (location-COUPLED, doubly legacy); egg-hub mixes @owner/slug:32hex + bare slug:32hex + bare-UUID parents and OMITS the spec-mandated hash_bits/_migrated_from metadata (its 128-bit ids are valid grandfathering, but not self-describing); commons/god-forum/resident use rappid:v3:base64url(SHA-256(pubkey)); commons genesis uses rappid:dimension:29hex; only hologram/frame-net/moment target canonical rappid:@owner/slug:64hex.

rappbook/RAPPverse federation family is decaying with no liveness/self-healing — a live counter-example to 'graceful degrade': CommunityRAPP deliberately EXITED (archived rappbook/+disco.json+10 dimension-sync workflows per CHANGELOG 2.1.0), openrapp's rapphub.json dns_seed is gone, so CrystalRAPP's disco.json points at 2 dead 404 peers + 2 live ones SILENTLY (no fallback, no health flag).

Engine/code duplication without drift control: rapp-commons embeds a FULL copy of the standalone rapp-hologram reference engine (hologram/*.js, fractal.html) with no hash parity; rapp-brainstem-beta vendors a full brainstem/ copy; commons also commits __pycache__/*.pyc cruft + ~36MB binaries (ambient.mp4 7.4MB, commons.html 423KB).

Broken pipelines firing red cron (not 'shelved'): rapp-commons federate.yml invokes a MISSING tools/federate.py (federation pipeline is broken); the dev→canary→prod release pipeline is BROKEN — every scheduled Promote-to-Canary/Gate-2 run red (2026-05-30→06-02), canary+dev frozen at 0.5.4, prod advanced to 0.6.1 straight from the grail, and promote-production does `git push production HEAD:main --force` (against 'never push to main').

Map+drift observatory lags the freshest estate: rapp-frame-net's rapp-frame/2.0 + rapp-frame-echo/1.0 + rapp-hydra/1.0 are ABSENT from rapp-god's 57-part registry; rapp-god's kernel label still says v0.6.0 while grail is 0.6.1; rapp-map's graph.json (gen 2026-06-10) misses repos pushed since (leviathan-hub 2026-06-28).

rapp-map is a stale + DIRTY index: its 402-card neurons-manifest repos[] holds ~56 entries that are NOT repos — doc titles ('RAPP Network Specification — specs/SPEC.md (the god spec)'), file paths ('docs/index.html'), bare hostnames ('https:/github.com'), and 'RAR/private-rar-template'. Any per-repo coverage count off it is unreliable.

Two parallel, uncoordinated 'network layer' god-specs with a name collision and ZERO cross-references: rapp-neighborhood-protocol/1.0 (cross-machine kited mesh) vs rapp-network/1.0 (RAPP-Network, on-device project twins). rapp-map's manifest even mislabels RAPP-Network's SPEC as 'the god spec'.

Kite-mark identity contradiction leaked into code + metadata: rapp-kited-twin's README says the mark is neutral/no-third-party-branding, but its GitHub description, its FORMER repo name (kody-w/kite-mark, still redirects and is still referenced as a stale dep by rapp-neighborhood-protocol), AND rapp-kite's kite_vtwin.js comment all call it 'the Microsoft logo flown as a kite'.

Provenance/copy-paste scars shipped to a 'released' repo: BOTH CommunityRAPP memory agents (context_memory_agent.py, manage_memory_agent.py) carry literal '# PASTE THE CONTENT OF <file> HERE / From the artifact' headers in a VERSION 1.0.0 repo — a recurring quality-gate gap for hand-assembled agents.

Endemic decorative VERSION-file drift: CommunityRAPP VERSION 1.0.0 vs CHANGELOG 2.1.0; ez-rapp package.json 0.1.0 vs releases 0.1.3; plant-smoke 0.6.0, canary/dev 0.5.4 — all lag grail 0.6.1. The canon's immutable brainstem-vX.Y.Z rollback-tag discipline is NOT propagated to satellites; their VERSION files are not rollback points.

Self-declared LIVE security blocker: rapp-roadmap's roadmap.json status.posture says 'run on a trusted/secure network' because of a present-day unauthenticated-RCE in the shipping Tier-1 brainstem (fleet-wire auth is the Phase-1 gate). 165 wrenches / 60 P0.

Dependency modeling conflates RAR-registry agents (@kody-w/... in kody-w/RAR/agents/) with GitHub repos: leviathan-hub depends_on lists rapp_leviathan_factory + wrap_leviathan as repos (they are RAR agents); rapp-spine foundation.json dead-links to kody-w/rappter, rapp_leviathan_factory, wrap_leviathan (all 404). Two address spaces mixed → phantom dependencies.

'Live/autonomous' surfaces outrun substrate reality: rapp-dataverse status.json generated ONCE ~21 min after repo creation and never refreshed; rapp-commons events/ has ZERO federated events (real activity only in games/); rapp-frame-net is one tick / one demo edge created the same day.

KNOWN-OPEN (Phase-0): grail tag hygiene — kody-w/rapp-installer tags are mixed (v0.6.0, brainstem-v0.6.1) and brainstem-v0.6.1 != main; standardize to one immutable brainstem-vX.Y.Z scheme matching main.
KNOWN-OPEN: rapp-god status labels still read v0.6.0 for the kernel group; refresh to 0.6.1 (a rapp-god rebuild, that repo's concern).
KNOWN-OPEN: kody-w/rapp-claude-skills hardcodes one personal Azure relay vs the decentralization north star; should resolve via GitHub-substrate discovery / swappable relay list.
KNOWN-OPEN (Phase-1): the kernel binds 0.0.0.0 + exposes unauth /api/agent (RCE) — roadmapped, experimental/secure-network-assumed.
archival_or_consolidation_candidates: kody-w/PowerApps — 2020 dead artifact, no RAPP relation beyond shared author; isArchived flag is actually false but it is functionally dead. Set the GitHub archive flag; treat as out-of-estate.

kody-w/rapp-installer-canary + kody-w/rapp-installer-dev — the BROKEN 3-repo release pipeline (red cron, frozen 0.5.4, prod ships from grail directly). Either repair the gate-2/promote chain or formally retire both and document grail→main as the real release path; remove the force-push-to-main promote job.
kody-w/rapp-plant-smoke-20260505-233637 — throwaway smoke-test plant, now stale (pinned kernel 0.6.0 vs grail 0.6.1; its own drift-verification recipe would fail on VERSION). Archive.

CrystalRAPP (+ ShadowRAPP, VoidRAPP, openrapp rappbook family) — decaying federation demo frozen at a single authoring snapshot (tick 75 / 2026-02-05) with half its peers 404. Either revive WITH liveness/health flags + fallback, or archive as a retired experiment. CommunityRAPP already exited and rapp-claude-skills already deprecated the rappbook/rappverse skills.
kody-w/rapp-store-archive — explicit archive; keep flagged as such, not a live part.

rapp-commons embedded hologram/ copy — consolidate to REFERENCE the standalone rapp-hologram engine instead of vendoring a full duplicate; strip __pycache__/*.pyc cruft and the ~36MB binaries off the GitHub substrate.

RAPP repo's specs/ecosystem-spec.json — drop the kernel repo's own copy of the machine spec OR make it a verified, automatically-synced mirror; rapp-god is the canonical owner and the kernel repo holding its own copy is the riskiest drift surface.
rapp-brainstem-beta vendored brainstem/ copy — consolidate to depend on the grail rather than vendoring a full brainstem.py (active drift risk).

rapp-agents vs RAR — two competing agent-distribution front doors (the RappLoader+stacks vs the RAR registry). Pick the canonical durable home (memory says RAR) and demote the other to a consumer to avoid two front doors.

kody-w/rapp-claude-skills — clean the outward GitHub metadata (description + topics still advertise dead rappbook/rappverse despite in-README deprecation) or archive; also stops teaching the single-Azure-relay path.

kody-w/openrappter — DECISION needed, not consolidation: it is a productized parallel fork with its own npm + own rappterhub registry, permanently outside rapp-god/rapp-map/RAPP-Bible governance. Treat strictly as map-context (a sibling track), never as an alignable leg; do not let ecosystem-sync attempt to reconcile it.

Stale dependency name kody-w/kite-mark — renamed to rapp-kited-twin; fix the dangling reference in rapp-neighborhood-protocol's depends_on and resolve the neutral-mark-vs-Microsoft-logo identity contradiction in one place.
going_forward_guidance: The grail is kody-w/rapp-installer (the local ~/.brainstem/src checkout = this repo, VERSION 0.6.1 verified). Land kernel/installer/seed-agent changes there FIRST, then propagate to the RAPP super-repo mirror + every ecosystem-spec.json copy. Never edit RAPP's brainstem copy as if authoritative — it diverges on 12 parts today.

Use rapp-god's LIVE api/v1/status.json as the truth for 'what exists and what is drifting' — NOT rapp-map's graph.json/neurons-manifest (stale 2026-06-10, repos[] polluted). But know rapp-god itself lags the newest changes: cross-check the live grail VERSION and register new specs (rapp-frame/echo/hydra) before treating them as canon.

Never spawn a sixth /chat reimplementation without a mechanical parity harness. Five copies already exist (function_app.py, beta's vendored copy, the SDK, openrappter, vbrainstem). If you touch one, touch all — or, preferably, depend on the grail instead of vendoring it. 'Parity is sacred' is currently hand-maintained at best.

Emit ONLY canonical rappid (rappid:@owner/slug:64hex, sha256) on any new surface; read all six legacy forms forever. Legacy surfaces must carry self-describing metadata (hash_bits/_migrated_from). Eternity stays PKI-free — the keypair is opt-in sovereignty; do not require it, EXCEPT the deliberate app-layer sign-everything choice in rapp-commons/rapp-resident/rapp-god-forum (that is a gh-free open-join profile, not a new PKI).

Treat the social layer's single Azure host (rapp-resident-kw165843) as an untrusted, replaceable relay — harden the kited/WebRTC fallback (it cold-starts and was briefly unreachable) and add NO new hard dependencies on that one hostname or on the public PeerJS broker. This is the estate's most material drift from the no-central-server north star.

Do NOT cite the rappbook-federation family (CrystalRAPP/ShadowRAPP/VoidRAPP/openrapp) as a working mesh or 'graceful degrade' proof — it is silent 404 link-rot. If a degrade demonstrator is needed, build liveness/health flags + fallback first.

Three layers are young and ahead of their substrate — leviathan (frame-net 1 tick/1 edge; leviathan-hub 2 eggs, v0.1.0 agent), the autonomous loops (commons events/ empty + broken federate.py; dataverse one-shot build), and the newest specs (frame/echo/hydra unregistered). Verify liveness before depending on them; the framing outruns the shipped reality.

When wiring dependencies, keep two address spaces distinct: GitHub repo slugs vs RAR-registry agents (@kody-w/... in kody-w/RAR/agents/). leviathan-hub and rapp-spine currently conflate them, producing phantom deps and dead 404 links.

Disambiguate 'the network spec' by scope: rapp-neighborhood-protocol/1.0 = cross-machine kited mesh; rapp-network/1.0 (RAPP-Network) = on-device project twins. Cross-link them; never assume the name is unambiguous.

Treat satellite VERSION files as decorative. Rely on git tags (brainstem-vX.Y.Z) + rapp-god's archived immutable frames for rollback points, and propagate the immutable-tag discipline to any satellite you ship.

Coverage caveat to carry forward: this map has full-fidelity re-verified detail on ~42 of 85 repos — the entire load-bearing spine plus the map/drift, social, network, identity, leviathan and on-ramp legs. The remaining ~43 (the rest of the satellites, the pkstop-*/sim-* planted instances enumerated in rapp-estate's estate.json, and the truncated verifier tail from rapp-store-archive onward) are known by enumeration/reference but not independently re-verified here. Close that tail in the next sweep before claiming total-estate operations; the spine itself is fully mapped.
coverage_confidence: HIGH — 86 repos deep-verified (85 rapp-named + RAR, the non-rapp-named agent registry). all 85 rapp-named repos deep-verified (41 spine line-rechecked + 44 tail deep-scanned 2026-06-28). The tail sweep upgraded several from satellite to load-bearing (e.g. RAPP_Store/RAPP_Sense_Store own canonical specs) and confirmed the rest non-load-bearing. The census tracks the live repo set incl. the new kernel-layer homes (rapp-eternity, rapp-distro).
systemic_issues: A cluster of non-fork verbatim snapshots exists (rapp_orion≈rapp-installer v0.6.1, RAPP_hippo≈CommunityRAPP, RAPPAIClaudeCodePlayground≈Copilot-Agent-365), all fork:false/parent:null. None can track upstream, so each is a guaranteed future drift source; RAPP_hippo has ALREADY drifted internally (VERSION 1.0.0 vs CHANGELOG 2.1.0). All three carry generic single-token descriptions ('RAPP_hippo','rapp_orion','RAPPAIClaudeCodePlayground'), marking them as codename/working-copy dumps rather than curated canon nodes.

A single shared Azure host (rapp-resident-kw165843.azurewebsites.net) is the durable relay for rapp-commons, rapp-god-forum, AND is hardcoded in rapp-claude-skills as 'the permanent cloud relay.' MASTER_PLAN rejects a central server; this is framed as untrusted-relay-with-kited-fallback, but it is one Azure Function appearing across the whole social layer — and it cold-started/was briefly unreachable during verification, a concrete availability single-point. This is the most material canon tension in the batch.

BATCH IDENTITY: All 12 are the 'rappterbook/rappter*' SIBLING ecosystem (an agent-social-network experiment cluster + a parallel-brand distribution stack), NOT the brainstem grail. Only kody-w/rappterbox is core-canon (the actual brainstem distribution/console). The rest are tangent/aligned satellites or drift. The first pass's canon_alignment calls are largely sound; the risk is treating this whole cluster as load-bearing RAPP infra when it is mostly demonstration of the GitHub-as-substrate thesis by a sibling brand universe (openrappter/RappterBox/.lispy/RAPPcoin/Zion-agents) that is lexically disjoint from canonical RAPP/RAR terminology.

CANONICAL-BRANCH / RAW-CDN-FROM-MAIN HAZARD: rappterbook-seedmaker has NO main branch — its only branch is impl/seedmaker. Any raw.githubusercontent.com/.../main/... consumer 404s. This is a latent install-path defect class for a GitHub-raw-CDN substrate; worth a sweep across the ecosystem for other repos whose default branch isn't main or whose advertised raw paths don't resolve.

DEAD-LINK CLAIMS NEED PER-REPO VERIFICATION: the first pass over-flagged kody-w/RAPP_Store and kody-w/RAPP_Hub as 'likely 404' when both are live public repos (RAPP_Store now resolves to the catalog that took the rapp_store name — a semantic-drift hazard, not a dead link).
